open_risks: Rapid-MLX v0.7.1 is a newer stable release, but P0 performed no upgrade; P1 must justify any version pin change against its release notes and local OpenAI-compatible tool-calling compatibility risk.
Kilo v7.3.42 was observed as a pre-release and is not the P1 baseline without separate qualification.
The current localhost Rapid-MLX process inventory implies command-line secret exposure risk if auth is passed via CLI arguments instead of safer channels.
`kilo debug config` can emit resolved secrets and must remain redacted in any persisted evidence.
Baseline memory state already shows heavy swap use and must be re-checked before raw-baseline certification work.
No MTP-named files were found in the cached model snapshot, but filename absence alone does not prove every MTP tensor is absent.
